customFields.special_instructions: Lames Jawson likes to be contacted quarterly.

questions.answer:
No meetings scheduled for today (February 4, 2026). Top priorities: 5 overdue follow-ups to contact—Andrew Lambotin (Malow Mediation & Arbitration, Inc.) 470-556-0757; Douglas Yanshonok (Honda Carland) 678-999-9805; ted.hawthorne@gmail.com; Lames Jawson (HAL's Consulting Corp) 503-555-2232; Todd Norman (Datatrac Corporation) 678-559-9866.

Pipeline: 5 open opportunities totaling $10,300 (weighted $3,075), led by **Jake Flakes-SC and Replacement Parts** at $2,300 (weighted $575) and **Muthound Enterprises-SC** at $2,000 (weighted $1,000, 50% in “Service Proposal”). Recent activity highlights: a “How are we doing?” web survey from John Jongkind (Inspections Jongkind) on January 22, 2026 (customer service 4, product knowledge 4, recommend 6; “Everything was great!”) and a new opportunity + call attempt logged for “Holiday Inn Worldwide” on January 22, 2026 (best contact noted: Betty Boop).
questions.action:
1. Call Andrew Lambotin at Malow Mediation & Arbitration, Inc. today to complete the overdue follow-up.  
2. Call Douglas Yanshonok at Honda Carland today to complete the overdue follow-up.  
3. Call Betty Boop at Holiday Inn Worldwide today to follow up on the Jan 22 call attempt and new opportunity.  
4. Move Muthound Enterprises-SC to next stage or schedule proposal review call today since it’s 50% in “Service Proposal”.
questions.answer_guidance: Data: today_meetings[] (each with meeting{} from calendar.items, contacts[] with full details, history[] for those contacts, opportunities[] linked via contacts.companyID), recent_history[], open_opportunities[], overdue_followups[] (contacts missing lastAttempt or > 7 days). Show for each meeting: time, subject, attendee names, recent history summary, linked opportunities.
questions.action_guidance: If today_meetings has meetings with contacts[]: 1) WHO: Extract contacts[0].fullName and contacts[0].emailAddress from today_meetings[0], 2) WHAT: draft pre-meeting email referencing history[0].details if available, confirming the meeting and asking about agenda priorities, 3) WHEN: send at least 1 hour before meeting.startTime. Include: subject line, greeting, body, sign-off. FALLBACK: If no meetings with contacts, use overdue_followups[0]: extract fullName and emailAddress, draft check-in email. Log outreach as History in Act!.

slipped_deals.name: Ace Pet Store-SC for Corp Offices
slipped_deals.creator: Chris Huffman

fetched_data.duckdb: GROUP BY period; SUM weighted; calc days_overdue; JOIN contacts for primary

questions.answer:
Forecast health is **poor**: there are **0 deals** forecasted in the next **30/60/90 days** (weighted **$0** in each window), and **99.8%** of the weighted pipeline is at risk due to slipped close dates.

- **Pipeline totals:** $296,150 total | $240,365 weighted  
- **Slipped deals:** 11 open deals with past estimated close dates (e.g., largest is **New Custom Pipe Project Suzie Ronald** at **$200,000 weighted**, estimated close **July 30, 2025**, **190** days overdue)  
- **Beyond 90 days:** 1 deal | **No-date deals:** 0
questions.action:
1. Assign Sales Manager to review all 11 slipped deals and update estimated close dates by Feb 7, 2026  
2. Schedule recovery call with Suzie Ronald for New Custom Pipe Project Suzie Ronald by Feb 8, 2026  
3. Update New Custom Pipe Project Suzie Ronald opportunity stage and probability in Act! CRM after the recovery call on Feb 8, 2026
questions.answer_guidance: Data: forecast_30d/60d/90d (each with deals[], weighted, count), slipped_deals[] sorted by value with _days_overdue, _primary_contact{name, email, phone}, beyond_90d_count (deals > 90 days out), no_date_count (opps missing close date), total_pipeline, total_weighted (all dated opps including >90d). Show: forecast by period, slipped deals needing attention, note beyond_90d_count and no_date_count.
questions.action_guidance: For slipped_deals[0] (highest value, most urgent): 1) WHO: _primary_contact.name with _primary_contact.phone or email. FALLBACK: If _primary_contact is null, use contactNames or assign deal owner to identify stakeholder, 2) WHAT: urgent call to reconfirm close date - ask about blockers and timeline. After call: update estimatedCloseDate in Act! and log call as History, 3) WHEN: call TODAY - deal is _days_overdue days past expected close. ALSO: If no_date_count > 0, note that X deals need estimatedCloseDate populated for accurate forecasting.

questions.question: At-risk deals

at_risk_deals.name: Ace Pet Store-SC for Corp Offices

fetched_data.duckdb: filter risk; JOIN history(contacts+companies); ORDER BY severity

questions.answer:
There are **10 at-risk deals totaling $26,300**, and **all are marked “Overdue”** (estimated close dates **June 17, 2012–July 20, 2012**) with **4,948–4,981 days overdue**.

- **Largest:** Ace Pet Store-SC for Corp Offices — **$4,000**, **25%**, closes **July 15, 2012**, Manager **Allison Mikola**, **4,953 days overdue**, last touch **April 15, 2025**
- **Highest probability (still overdue):**  
  - A1 Services of UK-SC — **$4,000**, **90%**, closes **July 20, 2012**, Manager **Chris Huffman**, **4,948 days overdue**, primary contact **Ann Goodall (0191254590)**  
  - Swing Software-SC — **$2,000**, **90%**, closes **July 20, 2012**, Manager **Chris Huffman**, **4,948 days overdue**, last touch **April 15, 2025**
questions.action:
1. Allison Mikola to call Ace Pet Store-SC for Corp Offices today to confirm status and update close date.  
2. Chris Huffman to call Ann Goodall at A1 Services of UK-SC today to requalify and set a next-step meeting.  
3. Chris Huffman to email Swing Software-SC today to confirm decision timeline and update opportunity stage.  
4. Sales ops to review all 10 Overdue at-risk deals by end of week and close-lost or reschedule stale opportunities.
questions.answer_guidance: Data: at_risk_deals[] with name, company (from opp.companies[0] or contact.company fallback), value, probability, risk_reason (Stalled/Overdue/Low-activity), days_in_stage, last_touch (via contacts.companyID), primary_contact{name, email, phone}. Sorted by severity (Overdue first). Show: deal name, company, value, risk_reason, days_in_stage, last_touch, primary contact.
questions.action_guidance: For at_risk_deals[0] (highest severity): 1) WHO: Extract primary_contact.name and primary_contact.phone or primary_contact.email from the deal. FALLBACK: If primary_contact is null, create task: 'Identify stakeholder for [deal name]' assigned to manager, 2) WHAT: recovery action based on risk_reason - Stalled: schedule alignment call; Overdue: reconfirm timeline and update estimatedCloseDate; Low-activity: reach out referencing last_touch. Log as History in Act!, 3) WHEN: take action TODAY - at-risk deals need immediate attention.

questions.question: Account momentum

fetched_data.duckdb: GROUP BY company; SUM pipeline; JOIN contacts for top_contact; sort reactivate by staleness

questions.answer:
Account momentum is low across the board: **0 accounts have any engagement in the last 30 days (eng30 = 0)** and the **last touch for all accounts is April 15, 2025 (296 days ago)**.

- **SAVE (pipeline to protect): 5 accounts totaling $12,300**
  - Ace Pet Store Franchises: $4,000 | last April 15, 2025 (296 days)
  - Boomer's Artworx: $4,000 | last April 15, 2025 (296 days)
  - Jake Flakes Inc.: $2,300 | last April 15, 2025 (296 days)
  - T-Bone's Steakhouse: $2,000 | top contact Mike Underwood (5415552422) | last April 15, 2025 (296 days)
  - Best Lender Financing: $2,000 | top contact Benny Lender (8475552221) | last April 15, 2025 (296 days)

- **RE-ACTIVATE: 5 accounts totaling $0 pipeline** (Parsley Group, Black Forest Baking, Brushy's Golfing World, Freemont Corp, MiniSoft) | all last touched April 15, 2025 (296 days); Black Forest Baking top contact Kristi Elmendorf (01255554).
questions.action:
1. Call Mike Underwood at T-Bone's Steakhouse (5415552422) today to re-engage and confirm next-step timeline.  
2. Call Benny Lender at Best Lender Financing (8475552221) today to restart the SAVE conversation and validate pipeline status.  
3. Email Kristi Elmendorf at Black Forest Baking (01255554) by tomorrow to schedule a re-activation check-in meeting.  
4. Assign account owners to Parsley Group, Brushy's Golfing World, Freemont Corp, and MiniSoft today to log a re-engagement activity.
questions.answer_guidance: Data: expand[], save[], reactivate[] - each company with name, id, pipeline (sum of opps via contacts.companyID), eng30 (engagement last 30 days via history.contacts.companyID), last (last touch), last_touch_days, category, top_contact{name, email, phone} (most recently engaged). Show: categorized company lists with pipeline value, engagement metrics, and top contact.
questions.action_guidance: For save[0] (highest pipeline at churn risk): 1) WHO: Extract top_contact.name, top_contact.phone or top_contact.email, and company name from save[0]. FALLBACK: If top_contact is null, create task: 'Identify stakeholder at [company name] via LinkedIn', 2) WHAT: proactive check-in call - acknowledge it's been last_touch_days days since contact, ask about current priorities and concerns. Log call as History in Act!, 3) WHEN: schedule call within 3 business days - declining engagement signals churn risk.

questions.question: Relationship gaps

relationship_analysis.opp: New Custom Pipe Project Suzie Ronald
Bick's Longhorns-Service for All Texas Facilities
Ace Pet Store-SC for Corp Offices

fetched_data.duckdb: COUNT engaged; flag single_threaded; find dark_contacts (sorted by staleness)

questions.answer:
All 10 opportunities show relationship gaps: **0 engaged contacts**, **single-threaded = true**, and **no dark contacts identified** (dark_contacts is empty for every deal).

**Single-threaded, unengaged opportunities (total 10):**
- New Custom Pipe Project Suzie Ronald — $200,000 (company data not available)
- New Opportunity — $10,000 (company data not available)
- Bick's Longhorns-Service for All Texas Facilities — $6,000 (company data not available)
- New AAU Project — $5,300 (company data not available)
- Ace Pet Store-SC for Corp Offices — $4,000 (Ace Pet Store Franchises)
- A1 Services of UK-SC — $4,000 (A1 Services of UK)
- Jake Flakes-SC and Replacement Parts — $2,300 (Jake Flakes Inc.)
- Burley Internet Communications-SC for SC — $2,000 (company data not available)
- Harbor Lights-SC for Restaurant — $2,000 (company data not available)
- Harrison & Graham Garages-SC — $2,000 (company data not available)
questions.action:
1. Assign the 10 opportunities to their owners and add at least two contacts per deal by Feb 9  
2. Schedule stakeholder discovery calls with Ace Pet Store Franchises, A1 Services of UK, and Jake Flakes Inc. by Feb 12  
3. Research and create company records for the six “company data not available” opportunities by Feb 9
questions.answer_guidance: Data: relationship_analysis[] with opp (deal name), company (from opp.companies or contact.company), value, engaged (count), single_threaded (bool), dark_contacts[] sorted by staleness (null lastReach first) with name, title, lastReach, channel, email, phone. Sorted by single_threaded first, then value desc. Show: deals with engagement count, single-threaded flag, and dark contacts prioritized by staleness.
questions.action_guidance: For first single_threaded deal in relationship_analysis[]: 1) WHO: Extract from dark_contacts[0]: state the contact's name, their title, and include their email (dark_contacts[0].email) or phone (dark_contacts[0].phone). FALLBACK: If dark_contacts is empty or all have channel='None', create task: 'Research [company] stakeholders on LinkedIn', 2) WHAT: draft email/call script to multi-thread - greet by name, introduce yourself, reference the opp name and company, ask about their priorities. After outreach: log as History in Act! linked to contact and opportunity, 3) WHEN: complete outreach within 3 business days - single-threaded = high risk.
